# Supernumber Project Context

> [!NOTE]
> **Detailed Context:** For full technical details, business logic, and coding standards, refer to [AI_CONTEXT_MASTER.md](AI_CONTEXT_MASTER.md).

## Overview
- **Project Name:** Supernumber
- **Core Business:** Lucky Phone Number Sales (เบอร์มงคล), Numerology Analysis (ทำนายดวง), and SEO Article System.
- **Main Tech Stack:** PHP 8.2+, Laravel 10/11, MySQL, Tailwind CSS v4.
- **Admin App:** Flutter-based mobile dashboard in `/admin_flutter`.

## Core Modules
1. **PhoneNumber Inventory:** Logic for analyzing numbers based on pair meanings. Supports `active`, `hold`, and `sold` statuses.
2. **Articles & SEO:** SEO-driven content system with Gemini AI integration and automated LINE broadcasting.
3. **RBAC System:** Role-based access control with `Manager`, `Admin`, and `Staff` levels.
4. **CI/CD:** GitHub Actions workflows for automated deployment and Telegram notifications.

## Development Patterns
- **Architecture:** Laravel MVC with Service Pattern preference.
- **UI:** Premium, rich aesthetics using Tailwind CSS v4 and modern typography.
- **Database:** Managed via Laravel Migrations. No direct edits.
- **Testing:** Unit and Feature tests in `/tests`. Run `php artisan test` before major changes.
- **Language:** UI and system messages are in **Thai**.

## Standard Commands
- **Start Dev:** `npm run dev` / `php artisan serve`
- **Test:** `php artisan test`
- **Migrations:** `php artisan migrate`
